name: garelier
description: Human-supervised multi-agent software-engineering framework — role-based local project coordination (PM, Dock, Worker, Scout, Smith, Artisan, Librarian, Observer, Guardian, Concierge, plus the external advisory-review Wanderer), execution lanes, knowledge governance, and quality/security review gates. Works with Claude Code and Codex CLI. Independent community project; not affiliated with, endorsed, or sponsored by Anthropic or OpenAI.
